# Feature request template (markdown)

**Title:** `[Feat]: <short summary>`

**Labels:** `type: feature`, `status: triage`

---

## Problem

What problem does this solve? Who is affected?

## Proposed solution

Describe the feature and how it should work.

## Area

- [ ] Gameplay
- [ ] Dictionary / learning
- [ ] Multiplayer / realtime
- [ ] UI / UX
- [ ] shiritori_flutter (Flutter)
- [ ] CI/CD / tooling
- [ ] Infrastructure (Terraform / OpenTofu)
- [ ] Other

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] 
- [ ] 

## Alternatives considered

Optional — other approaches you thought about.

## Additional context

Screenshots, mockups, links.

---

**Hashtags:** #feature #enhancement
